name: run_cmd
description: Run commands or multi-line scripts with --dir, --venv, --pythonpath, --env, --env-file, --timeout, and stdin/heredoc support, replacing cd+source+export+command, cd+node -e, and cd+ts-node patterns.

parameters.name: --venv=PATH
parameters.description: Activate Python virtual environment from PATH/bin/activate before command

parameters.name: --pythonpath=PATH
parameters.description: Set PYTHONPATH before executing (e.g., --pythonpath=/app for app module imports)

parameters.name: --env-file=PATH
parameters.description: Load env vars from file (KEY=val lines)

parameters.name: --interpreter=bash|python|node|ts-node|npx
parameters.description: Interpreter for stdin scripts (default: bash); ts-node for TypeScript

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: Command and arguments to run, or omit for heredoc/stdin script

parameters.name: --save-env=PATH
parameters.description: Save explicitly passed --env vars to a KEY=val file for reuse

examples.expected: Runs pytest in /app with venv activated and PYTHONPATH set

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses cd + source venv + export + command or cd + export + bash heredoc into one step; --venv=PATH replaces separate . venv/bin/activate step, saving 1 step per invocation; --pythonpath=PATH replaces --env=PYTHONPATH=... shortening commands and eliminating repetitive PYTHONPATH exports seen in samples; --interpreter=node/ts-node replaces cd+node -e/cd+ts-node -e inline execution patterns, saving 2+ steps per invocation.
